items.name: Black Cropped Y2K Cami Tank Top
items.description:
This black or gray cropped spaghetti strap cami top is perfect for anyone going for that grunge Y2K look! Very simple , defined , and detailed ! Can work with preppy , model , emo , or black and white outfits .
Top is blank , so it works great to wear underneath jackets and any other top . Fits all avatars especially the chibi bundle

⭐ JOIN KEYSMASH FOR MORE OR REQUEST COLOR VARIATIONS

items.description:
MARCHÉE - Black Wide Leg Pleated Trousers with Extended Leather Belt Detail
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.
